title: Largan, Robert - Government Whip in the House of Commons - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Largan left his role in the House of Commons in July 2024.  Senior Manager, Client Relationship Executive, Deloitte LLP  Robert Largan sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Deloitte. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in July 2025; and the appointment was taken up in August 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
